description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure suspended in midair by two long, taut straps or ribbons attached at the shoulders. The figure is dressed in a collared shirt and fitted pants, with the arms held tightly to the sides and the legs slightly bent at the knees. The head is upright and the facial features are stylized and minimal. The shoes are simple and flat, and the overall form is elongated and slightly abstracted, with smooth, faceted surfaces. The straps appear to be supporting the entire weight of the figure, suggesting a dynamic or acrobatic pose, possibly reminiscent of aerial performance or rescue scenarios.
description: An adult human figure in a collared shirt and pants is suspended by two straps, with arms at the sides and legs bent, evoking an acrobatic or suspended pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and both straps extending upward from the shoulders, with the legs and feet visible below.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the head, the side of the torso, and the left leg, with the straps extending diagonally upward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and body, with both straps visible and the legs slightly apart.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the right profile of the figure, the side of the torso, and the right leg, with the straps extending upward.
attribute_posture: suspended with arms at sides and legs bent
